commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 4. "With praise will I call upon the Lord, and I shall be safe from Mine enemies" (ver. 3). Seeking not My own but the Lord's glory, I will call upon Him, and there shall be no means whereby the errors of ungodliness can hurt Me.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Praising. Hebrew, "praised "and (2 Kings) the Lord, who is worthy to be praised. (Haydock)
Chaldean agrees here with the Septuagint and Vulgate, which seems more natural. (Calmet)
The sense is the same. (Berthier)
